keywords.job: I am the king of all minotaurs. I have been the king for more than 320 years.
keywords.real: Yes, I am the real king. Palkar is the leader of the outcasts.
keywords.name: I am Markwin, the old and real king of this city.
keywords.time: Don't ask me such stupid questions. My time is over right now.
keywords.outcast: Those are no minos any longer. They left the city and killed their brothers. And they stole the key to my secret lab.
keywords.mintwallin: The former glorious city lies in the dirt. It is my home. I founded it about 180 years ago, when we found this lovely place.
keywords.city: The former glorious city lies in the dirt. It is my home. I founded it about 180 years ago, when we found this lovely place.
keywords.chronicle: I am one of the minotaurs that are able to write. So I wrote most of the history of my beloved city Mintwallin in some books.
keywords.books: I am one of the minotaurs that are able to write. So I wrote most of the history of my beloved city Mintwallin in some books.
keywords.prisoner: He is totally mad. I don't know how he could find the way through the labyrinth. I arrested him in the prison.
keywords.human: I hate them all. Minotaurs have no own spelling, so I used the speech of the humans. Once I was a prisoner of them. Since then I hate them - and since then I can speak and write in their language.
keywords.labyrinth: It protected us for a long time. There are lots of traps in it. And many long tunnels. There haven't been many foes that found their way through it. Only that prisoner once arrived.
keywords.kaplar: I really don't know what it means. But ALL minos say it! Terrible!
keywords.secret: Hehe - you will never find a way to enter it. The outcast stole the key. You are too weak to conquer it. HARHARHAR.
keywords.lab: First of all you will need a second fellow to help you.
keywords.enter: First of all you will need a second fellow to help you.
keywords.second: After you entered the first area you will need the key from the outcasts.
keywords.fellow: Yeah - he has to step on a special tile and an entrance will appear at a very poisenous place!
keywords.place: Na! You will have to find it yourself!
keywords.minotaurs: My fellows all are minotaurs. It is my folk. I am the king of all minos.
keywords.minos: My fellows all are minotaurs. It is my folk. I am the king of all minos.
keywords.key: There are many keys. The outcast stole the key to our secret lab! They should burn!
keywords.demon: He was the beginning of our end. He is mighty and powerful. He killed many brave minos and after his arrival we weren't able to go up to the surface.
keywords.light: I would like to see the light of the sun again, but you will probably kill me. Go away!
keywords.sun: I would like to see the light of the sun again, but you will probably kill me. Go away!
keywords.surface: I would like to see the light of the sun again, but you will probably kill me. Go away!
keywords.palkar: He is the leader of the outcast. In former times he was my best warrior, but now he is my worst enemy.
keywords.karl: The man who explored this part of the map first. Strange guy. He likes to be announced as hunter. I don't like him. He is a human.
keywords.milk: No! I won't tell you the powers of our milk!

texts: No! The hornless have reached my city! BODYGUARDS TO ME!
Oh, it's you again. What do you want, hornless messenger?
Well ... you defeated my guards! Now everything is over! I guess I will have to answer your questions now.

greetingPatterns.response: No! The hornless have reached my city! BODYGUARDS TO ME!
Oh, it's you again. What do you want, hornless messenger?
Well ... you defeated my guards! Now everything is over! I guess I will have to answer your questions now.

entries.response: Uhm, well thank you, hornless beeing.
Don't mock the king of the minotaurs or you will regret that!
